response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song "CRAZY" through on-screen lyrics and search. Searched for "CRAZY" by Vivid BAD SQUAD, Japanese and English lyrics. The performer is Pavolia Reine. Song "Kill Kiss" is mentioned by the performer in the talk segment but is not performed in the video, so it is not listed as a scene with vocal music.
response.global_summary: Performance of the song "CRAZY" by Pavolia Reine, followed by a talking segment where she discusses the stage design, the concept, and the songs in the setlist.

scenes.description: Pavolia Reine talks to the audience, introducing herself and discussing the birthday event and stage design. She mentions the songs performed (Kill Kiss and Crazy).
